architecture.runtime_query_model: Immediate DB mirror built from canonical YAML
architecture.resolver_contract: Planner emits bounded pre-context bundle (ordered steps, gates, constraints)
architecture.parity_requirement: YAML and DB mirror must remain semantically equivalent

phase_plan.title: Canonical + Resolver Baseline
deliverables: Versioned YAML schema for atomic/composite options and typed edges
Seed catalog entries for scripts + proteins + checklists
Resolver API that emits deterministic execution bundle
exit_gates: Schema validator blocks invalid graphs (missing nodes, invalid edges, cycles)
Resolver is deterministic for identical inputs
At least two composites resolve end-to-end (react preflight, design review)

phase_plan.title: DB Mirror + Parity + Scoring
deliverables: DB mirror builder from YAML catalog
Parity checks between YAML canonical and DB mirror
Trace-driven score adjustments integrated into candidate ranking
exit_gates: Mirror refresh is reproducible and idempotent
Parity checks fail CI on semantic drift
Ranking reflects persisted score adjustments from planning outcomes

risk_register.risk: Dual-track drift between YAML and DB
risk_register.mitigation: Strict parity checks and CI gate before deploy
Mandatory pre-context bundle gate in dispatch preflight
Use weighted outcomes and confidence thresholds

next_actions: Create tasks for Phase A and Phase B workstreams
Implement schema validator and resolver baseline first
Implement mirror + parity checks before enabling score-influenced ranking in production
